name: MSI Z790 GAMING PRO WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 3x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 1.4 - 2.5Gb LAN - GbE LAN - Intel 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E (Z790GAMPROWIFI)
shortName: MSI Z790 GAMING PRO WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 3x PCIe
description: Full-ATX gaming motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR5 support, multiple PCIe slots, and WiFi 6E.
